Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blackwatch]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — The Blackwatch is an organization Alsa was associated with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — The Blackwatch is a group that Witnesses have worked with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — The Blackwatch defend against the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Rumors suggest the Blackwatch worship Elders and drink human blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — The Blackwatch are associated with something called a Whispering Gaunt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackwatch is a group that members might wish were around to answer questions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — The Emperor formed the Blackwatch to turn the power of the Elders against them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Watchmen of the Blackwatch wear black uniforms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Blackwatch is an organization that provides help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — The Blackwatch consists of soldiers in black who stand between people and the hunger of the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Blackwatch is a group consisting of members in black coats.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackwatch was founded to turn the powers of the Elders to the good of humanity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackwatch intends to bind the Heart to one of their choosing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — Blackwatch is a group that Calder could potentially claim an issue for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackwatch is a group that appears to have gouged a hole in the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Blackwatch maintains shelters made of driftwood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackwatch are fighting their own creatures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — A contingent of Blackwatch descended the crater walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Blackwatch use iron nails as a form of salute.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Blackwatch is a group with members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Blackwatch authority is limited to Guild-sanctioned assignments or certain emergencies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — The Blackwatch are not held in high public opinion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Blackwatch members can order citizens to do things related to an Elder or Elder magic, or if Elderspawn are spotted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Blackwatch is involved in the meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Blackwatch is associated with a crest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — The Blackwatch is a Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Blackwatch is a group that Calder has been a member of for some time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — The Blackwatch is a group that has authority and uniforms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Members of the Blackwatch keep Shuffles as pets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Blackwatch has handled the Elders for the past five years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — The Blackwatch fish for Elders in the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — The Blackwatch capture and examine Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — The Blackwatch is an organization that commissions reports and uses The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Artur Belfry's report was confidential to the Blackwatch.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Blackwatch is an organization that Tombstone was questioned about wearing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Blackwatch is a group that Yala intends to sabotage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Clayborn intends to rendezvous with the Blackwatch on Nakothi's island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The Blackwatch is hunting for the Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — The Blackwatch are stationed on the western side of Nakothi's island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Blackwatch members wear silver-buttoned black coats.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — The Blackwatch would be calling for the death of the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Blackwatch and the Luminian Order are in conflict.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — A member of the Blackwatch stole sensitive documents regarding Nakothi and her spawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The Watchman betrayed the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Blackwatch crest is the Elder Eyes.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Calder is hunted by the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Bliss is the Head of the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Blackwatch is a group that includes predecessors of Bliss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — The Blackwatch declined to formally register charges against Calder Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Blackwatch is a group that performs tests on Elder creatures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Blackwatch is an organization Jerri's father belonged to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Head of the Blackwatch spoke four hundred years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Blackwatch is part of the Imperialist alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackwatch arrived after an Elderspawn infection had already spread through a region.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackwatch punishes breaches of conduct by feeding people to Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — The mission of the Blackwatch is studying the Elders in the service of humanity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Blackwatch is an organization that receives reports.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Blackwatch has creeds including 'Through understanding, we control the unknown'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Blackwatch is a group that provides protection to the people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — The Blackwatch is a group that can be called to one's side through official Guild action.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Calder spent two years in the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — The Blackwatch commissioned research into the Sandborn Hydra's properties for work on The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — The Blackwatch is one of the groups mobilized by the Emperor to deal with Elder activity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Calder was expelled from the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Calder spent time with the Blackwatch.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — The ancient Blackwatch would capture Elders and kill the Elder-touched.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — The Blackwatch is a group that captures and studies Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackwatch has lost contact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackwatch is a group that knows about the ability to travel and live longer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackwatch is mentioned in the same context as Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Blackwatch's head is usually a woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — The Blackwatch is a group whose Guild Head can be unpredictable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Blackwatch are cleansing the Capital of Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Blackwatch is one of the groups expected to attack Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — The Blackwatch is a group Darius has seen action against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Blackwatch is a group that includes a girl with a spear.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Blackwatch recovered a fragment of pottery from the Thousand Eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — A guiding principle of the Blackwatch is that Elders must be studied if they are to be opposed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — The Blackwatch studies Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Blackwatch is a group that Calder's mother can represent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Blackwatch is a disciplined, regimented army wearing long, black, silver-buttoned coats.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Head of the Blackwatch has vouched for Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — A flock of Blackwatch is holding a building secure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackwatch used an inn as their headquarters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Blackwatch has disproved most superstitions about Elder names.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Watchmen in the Blackwatch sometimes develop a Reader's sense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Blackwatch is described as acting like a militia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Calder worked for the Blackwatch in his youth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — The Blackwatch is associated with seven spikes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Blackwatch is a group that Bliss belongs to.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Blackwatch pulled nails from their coats.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Yala was surrounded by dead or dying Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Blackwatch is an army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Blackwatch is part of a panel formed by Calder to counter reports.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Blackwatch has had trouble with tombs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Blackwatch performs monthly inspections of Urg’naut's tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Blackwatch is a group of fighters fighting alongside Luminians.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
